name: list_all_actors
description: List every actor in the current UE5 level via the native C++ BionicsBridge path (5-20ms). Confirms end-to-end Bionics → BionicsBridge → UE5 round-trip at native speed. Read-only. Works on any level.
prerequisites: UE5 Editor open with any level loaded
BionicsBridge plugin installed and compiled (see plugins/BionicsBridge/README.md)
warnings: If ue5_native_status fails, the BionicsBridge plugin is not running. Falls back via HTTP Remote Control is NOT automatic for native-only tools — rebuild the plugin.
